raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "A $40 million investment has been approved to jumpstart the design phase of the Last Chance Grade Project.",
    "The Last Chance Grade Project aims to address a 3-mile segment of Highway 101 that experiences geological instability.",
    "Caltrans will begin designing a new 6,000 foot tunnel to bypass a landslide-prone section of Highway 101.",
    "The completed tunnel will be the longest in the state of California.",
    "The restoration of the Last Chance Grade corridor will provide more reliable transportation and support economic resilience for local communities."
  ]
}
```
